heading: Reports to Congress
label: 4242 Reports to Congress
notes: Codification, and , enacted identical sections 823 of . This section is based on the text of , as added by .Pub. L. 106–568, § 203Pub. L. 106–569, § 513Pub. L. 104–330section 823 of Pub. L. 104–330Pub. L. 106–569, § 513

children.text: a description of the progress made in accomplishing the objectives of this subchapter;
a summary of the use of funds available under this subchapter during the preceding fiscal year; and
a description of the aggregate outstanding loan guarantees under .section 1715z–13b of title 12

children.heading: Related reports
children.label: b Related reports
children.text: The Secretary may require the Director to submit to the Secretary such reports and other information as may be necessary in order for the Secretary to prepare the report required under subsection (a).
